# Real-world pymatgen VASP fixtures

These fixtures are small public VASP input examples copied from the
`materialsproject/pymatgen` test data.

- Source repository: https://github.com/materialsproject/pymatgen
- Source commit: `d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab`
- License: MIT, per https://github.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/blob/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/LICENSE
- Retrieved: 2026-06-09
- Local copy note: line endings and trailing final blank lines may be normalized for repository checks.

| Local file | Source URL |
| --- | --- |
| `INCAR` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/test-files/io/vasp/inputs/INCAR |
| `POSCAR_Fe3O4` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/test-files/io/vasp/inputs/POSCAR_Fe3O4 |
| `POSCAR_bcc` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/test-files/io/vasp/inputs/POSCAR_bcc |
| `KPOINTS_monkhorst` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/test-files/io/vasp/inputs/KPOINTS |
| `KPOINTS_explicit` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/test-files/io/vasp/inputs/KPOINTS_explicit |
| `KPOINTS_gamma` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/materialsproject/pymatgen/d6b4ea50a001a0c10434c433d72d38e51e410fab/test-files/io/vasp/inputs/KPOINTS_gamma |
